> **⚠️ Privacy reminder.** Don't include real message content in your
> description. Describe the shape of what you want, not concrete examples
> from your own conversations.

## What's the problem?

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's frustrating about the current
     behavior? -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Concrete behavior. CLI flag name, expected output format, etc. -->

## Why does this belong in this tool?

<!-- This project intentionally stays stdlib-only, single-file, read-only
     against chat.db. Features that need new runtime dependencies or
     write access are generally out of scope. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Other tools (imessage-exporter, etc.), workarounds, or whether
     this could be a post-processing script instead. -->
